title: lomaria lucida
intro: Lomaria lucida, also known as the shining maidenhair fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lomariopsidaceae, native to New Zealand and Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lomaria lucida include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory conditions, and supporting immune function. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use through infusion or decoction, and it can be consumed as a tea or added to topical creams and ointments.
